evals.prompt: Generate ad copy for Retreat House. Creative brief exists at Desktop/Retreat House/Retreat House/deliverables/retreat-house-creative-brief.json. Both Google and Meta, 4 campaigns, phased strategy.
evals.expected_output: Google RSAs for Brand Search + Non-Brand Search (4 ad groups). Meta primary text + headlines for Prospecting and Retargeting. Image prompts using architectural photography prefix. Video storyboards with voiceover for 2 video ads. All character limits respected.

assertions.name: rsa_character_limits
assertions.description: All Google headlines ≤ 30 chars, all descriptions ≤ 90 chars, path fields ≤ 15 chars

assertions.name: meta_text_limits
assertions.description: Primary text flagged if over 125 chars, headlines ≤ 40 chars, descriptions ≤ 30 chars

assertions.name: image_prompts_use_prefix
assertions.description: Image prompts start with or incorporate the image_gen_prompt_prefix from creative brief

assertions.name: video_has_vo_script
assertions.description: Video storyboards include clean voiceover text without stage directions or parentheticals

assertions.name: ab_variants_generated
assertions.description: A/B test variants from creative brief ab_testing.test_pairs are reflected in copy variants

assertions.name: proof_elements_integrated
assertions.description: Dezeen, ATHA, $74K/yr stat appear naturally in ad copy, not forced

evals.prompt: Write Meta ad copy for a local restaurant in Gurugram. No creative brief exists. Budget $1500/month. They do North Indian cuisine with a rooftop setting. Run in standalone mode.
evals.expected_output: Guided questions asked first. PAS framework for prospecting. Instagram-optimized aspect ratios for image prompts. Reels-first video storyboard. Local targeting language.

assertions.name: standalone_questions_asked
assertions.description: 6 guided questions asked before copy generation — product, platform, personas, hooks, proof, brand voice

assertions.name: pas_framework_used
assertions.description: Prospecting copy follows PAS (Problem-Agitate-Solution) framework

assertions.name: instagram_optimized
assertions.description: Image prompts include 4:5 and 9:16 aspect ratios for Instagram feed and stories/reels

assertions.name: meta_only_output
assertions.description: No Google RSA or Google CSV generated — Meta only

assertions.name: local_language
assertions.description: Copy includes local/geographic references appropriate for Gurugram audience

evals.prompt: Generate Google Ads copy only for a B2B SaaS company. Standalone mode. Product: project management tool for agencies, $49/user/month. Google Search only, no Meta.
evals.expected_output: Feature-Benefit-Proof framework for RSAs. Professional tone. 15 headlines per ad group with character limits. No video storyboards needed. No Meta CSV.

assertions.name: feature_benefit_proof
assertions.description: RSA headlines and descriptions follow Feature-Benefit-Proof framework

assertions.name: fifteen_headlines
assertions.description: Each RSA has 15 distinct headlines, all ≤ 30 characters

assertions.name: b2b_professional_tone
assertions.description: Copy uses professional B2B language — no casual/playful tone, focuses on efficiency/ROI/team productivity

assertions.name: google_only_output
assertions.description: No Meta CSV, no Reels/Stories image prompts — Google assets only

assertions.name: price_point_messaging
assertions.description: $49/user price point referenced in at least some headlines/descriptions

evals.prompt: Write ad copy for an e-commerce fashion brand. Creative brief exists. Both platforms. They have 30+ SKUs across 3 collections. Catalog/carousel campaigns on Meta, Shopping + Search on Google.
evals.expected_output: Multiple RSAs for different product categories. Carousel copy with per-card headlines. Product-specific image prompts. Collection-level messaging angles.

assertions.name: multi_product_rsa
assertions.description: Separate RSAs per product category/collection, not one generic RSA

assertions.name: carousel_copy
assertions.description: Carousel ad copy includes per-card headlines that tell a sequential story or highlight different features

assertions.name: product_specific_prompts
assertions.description: Image prompts vary by product/collection — not one generic prompt for all

assertions.name: shopping_feed_alignment
assertions.description: Google copy aligns with Shopping campaign structure — product titles, descriptions match feed optimization

assertions.name: meta_csv_variants
assertions.description: Meta CSV includes multiple ad variants with A/B labels per collection

evals.prompt: Generate ad copy for Ananda Wellness Retreat. Creative brief exists. Meta only. 7-day yoga retreat, $1200/person. Seasonal peaks Oct-Mar.
evals.expected_output: BAB framework for transformation narrative. Video storyboards with voiceover for retreat experience. Reels-optimized vertical prompts. Seasonal urgency in copy. Testimonial-driven retargeting.

assertions.name: bab_framework
assertions.description: Prospecting copy follows Before-After-Bridge framework — transformation narrative (stressed → renewed → book the retreat)

assertions.name: video_storyboard_complete
assertions.description: Video storyboard has 4-6 frames with visual, text overlay, voiceover, motion, music for each

assertions.name: vo_clean_for_ai
assertions.description: Voiceover script is clean text — no parentheticals, no stage directions, natural contractions, short sentences

assertions.name: seasonal_messaging
assertions.description: Copy references seasonal availability or urgency appropriate for Oct-Mar peak

assertions.name: reels_vertical_prompts
assertions.description: Image prompts include 9:16 vertical compositions for Reels/Stories placement
